title: Optimizer should fail task/stages when baseline evaluation fails

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Baseline eval failure is currently returned as plexus_evaluation_run toolResponse (array of {error: ...}) but the optimizer Lua does not treat that as fatal, so Task/TaskStages end COMPLETED. Implement: detect evaluation_run failures and raise error to abort run; ensure task/stage failure messages include item/feedback IDs. Add focused test around evaluation_run result handling in optimizer Lua or procedure executor.
